message:
fix: remove legacy SQLite (beads.db) code paths from Gas Town (gt-g7xt8c)

Remove remaining Beads Classic SQLite references now that Dolt is the sole backend:

- Remove beads.db fallback check from ComputeRedirectTarget (beads_redirect.go)
- Update integration test to check for dolt/ directory instead of beads.db
- Update doctor check comments to reference Dolt instead of SQLite

Most items in the original issue (errant DB recovery, setSyncModeForAllRigs,
dolt_hooks_check.go, worktree_check.go, SyncRemote field, bd sync patterns)
were already removed by prior work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
